hero.desc: Pigmentation is frustrating because it keeps changing with sun, stress, and hormones. At Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, we build a personalised plan that targets your pigment type, not just your skin tone.
hero.address: LG 10, Lower Ground Floor, Wisma UOA II, Jalan Pinang, 50450 Kuala Lumpur
hero.floatingDesc: MedLite C6 ND:YAG • Pico Laser • Dermamelan

whyMalaysia.title: Here's why pigmentation feels extra stubborn
whyMalaysia.desc: Pigmentation does not just show up. It builds. In Malaysia, a few things make pigment flare-ups common.
whyMalaysia.cause1Desc: Even short daily exposure adds up

whatIs.title: What pigmentation actually is
whatIs.subtitle: (in simple words)
whatIs.desc: Pigmentation happens when your skin produces extra melanin (the pigment that gives skin its colour). Sometimes the pigment is on the surface. Sometimes it sits deeper. That depth matters, because it changes what will work best.
whatIs.quote: "That is why one person improves fast with a peel, while another needs lasers and long-term maintenance."

types.title: Types of pigmentation we commonly see in Kuala Lumpur
types.desc: Not all "dark spots" are the same. Most patients have more than one type.
types.type1Desc: Patchy, hormonal pigment on cheeks, forehead, upper lip
types.type2Desc: Small, defined brown spots from UV exposure
types.type3Desc: Genetic spots that darken with sun exposure
types.type4Desc: Dark marks after acne, rash, or irritation
types.warningTitle: Is it pigmentation or something else?
types.warningDesc: If a spot is changing fast, bleeding, ulcerating, or looks very different from other spots, do not treat it like cosmetic pigmentation. Get it assessed medically first.

whoFor.goodFitTitle: You are likely a good fit if:
whoFor.fit1: You have dark spots, melasma patches, uneven tone, or stubborn marks
whoFor.fit2: Your pigment gets worse after sun exposure
whoFor.fit3: You want a plan that balances results with skin safety
whoFor.pauseTitle: You may need to pause if:
whoFor.pause1: Your skin is actively inflamed (eczema flare, severe acne)
whoFor.pause3: You are using strong prescriptions without guidance

treatments.title: Pigmentation treatments available at Nexus Clinic
treatments.desc: Each treatment is matched to your pigment type, depth, and skin response
treatments.t1Desc: MedLite C6 ND:YAG and Pico Laser for stubborn, deeper, or well-defined spots
treatments.t2Desc: Surface refresh for superficial pigment and dullness

laserVsPeel.title: Laser vs Chemical Peel in Malaysia
laserVsPeel.subtitle: Which one should you choose?
laserVsPeel.laserDesc: Better for defined spots or deeper pigment, when properly selected and performed
laserVsPeel.peelDesc: Great for surface pigment, dullness, and tone, especially if your barrier is sensitive
laserVsPeel.comboNote: Many patients do best with a combination plan, not a single method.
laserVsPeel.guideNote: Nexus Clinic has an in-depth guide comparing both for Asian skin tones.

results.title: What results can you expect
results.subtitle: (the honest version)
results.result1: Faster brightening in the first few weeks if pigment is superficial
results.result2: Gradual improvement over months for deeper pigment or melasma
results.result3: Best long-term results when you treat and maintain together
results.melasmaNote: Melasma, in particular, can be long-term. It may fade slightly, but often persists without professional treatment.
results.downtimeTitle: Downtime: what it feels like in real life
results.downtime2: Temporary darkening of spots before they fade
results.downtime3: Light flaking or dryness if a peel is used
results.downtimeNote: If you have events coming up, we plan around them. Pigmentation treatment is not just medical, it is lifestyle timing too.

safety.title: Side effects and risks
safety.subtitle: (and how we reduce them)
safety.desc: Most side effects are temporary, but pigmentation treatments need respect, especially for Asian skin.
safety.safetyNote: Your safest decision is simple: do not chase aggressive settings because you want faster results. Pigmentation loves inflammation.

areas.title: Areas we can treat
areas.desc: Pigmentation is not only on the cheeks

cost.title: Cost of pigmentation treatment in Kuala Lumpur
cost.disclaimer: Treat these as general benchmarks, not fixed pricing. The right plan is the one that works for your pigment and does not trigger rebound.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about pigmentation treatment in KL
faq.q1: What causes pigmentation on the face?
faq.a1: Pigmentation can come from sun exposure, hormonal changes, genetics, ageing, and skin injury or inflammation. In Malaysia, sun exposure and inflammation from acne or irritation are common triggers.
faq.a2: Some pigmentation can fade for a long time, but 'permanent' is tricky, especially if the trigger is still present. Maintenance is the difference-maker. Without sun protection and the right homecare, pigment can return.
faq.q3: What is the best treatment for pigmentation in Malaysia?
faq.a3: It depends on the type and depth of pigment. Malaysian clinics commonly discuss options like pico laser, Q-switched laser, and chemical peels. A plan is 'best' when it improves pigment without triggering rebound or irritation.
faq.q4: Is laser treatment safe for melasma?
faq.a4: Laser can be safe when performed by trained doctors using appropriate technology and settings, but melasma needs extra care. Aggressive laser approaches can worsen pigmentation if not used carefully.
faq.q5: How many sessions will I need?
faq.a5: There is no single number. Some people see visible improvement after a few sessions, while deeper or recurring pigment patterns take more time. Multiple sessions are typical for pico laser programs.

whyNexus.title: Why choose Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur?
whyNexus.desc: Because you do not just want lighter spots. You want stable skin that stays calm.
whyNexus.point1Desc: Long-standing KL clinic with proven expertise
whyNexus.point2Desc: Easy access at Wisma UOA II, Jalan Pinang
whyNexus.point4Desc: Practical education for Asian skin tones
